api_key.description: Judge.me API token (api_token). Sent as a query parameter on every request; never logged.

shop_domain.description: The Shopify shop domain (e.g. example.myshopify.com). Sent as the shop_domain query parameter on every request.

base_url.description: Judge.me API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
